name: FUNCTIONS_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: Given a TargetPair, list target functional categories with patent counts.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
MATCH (tp)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t:Target)-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]->(f:Functional_of_Target)
RETURN f.name AS function, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, function ASC
LIMIT 50;

result_schema.patent_count: Number of patents linked to targets in the function

examples: Which functional categories are associated with PD-1×VEGFA?
